rows.command_eng: When the contact sensor is detected, turn on the light.
When the presence sensor detects someone, turn on the TV.
When the sound sensor value exceeds 50, stop speaker playback.
When it rains, turn on the dehumidifier.
When the brightness falls below 100 lux, turn on the light.
When the carbon dioxide concentration reaches 1000ppm or higher, sound the emergency siren.
When smoke is detected, sound the fire alarm with the siren.
When the button is pushed 3 times, open the valve.
When the temperature reaches 35 degrees or higher, set the air conditioner to 30 degrees.
When the safe is unlocked, sound the police siren.
When the contact sensor is detected, turn on the light.
